Klasse DepartmentManager

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.DepartmentManager
public class DepartmentManager extends Object
This class manages the departments in the database. It provides methods to create, read, update and delete departments. It also implements a simple caching mechanism to improve performance when retrieving departments.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    clearCache()
    Clear both per-department and list caches immediately.
    boolean
    deleteDepartment(String departmentName)
    Deletes the department with the given name from the database.
    boolean
    existsDepartment(String departmentName)
    Checks if a department with the given name exists.
    List<Map<String,Object>>
    getAllDepartments()
    Retrieves all departments from the database.
    Map<String,Object>
    getDepartment(String departmentName)
    Retrieves the department with the given name from the database.
    static DepartmentManager
    getInstance()
    Returns the singleton instance of DepartmentManager.
    boolean
    insertDepartment(String departmentName, String kontoNumber)
    Inserts a new department into the database.
    boolean
    updateDepartment(String departmentName, String newKontoNumber)
    Updates the konto number of a department with the given name.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Methodendetails

    • getInstance

      public static DepartmentManager getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of DepartmentManager.
      Gibt zurück:
      the singleton instance of DepartmentManager.

    • insertDepartment

      public boolean insertDepartment(String departmentName, String kontoNumber)
      Inserts a new department into the database.
      Parameter:
      departmentName - The name of the department.
      kontoNumber - The konto number of the department.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if successful, false otherwise.

    • existsDepartment

      public boolean existsDepartment(String departmentName)
      Checks if a department with the given name exists.
      Parameter:
      departmentName - The name of the department.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the department exists, false otherwise.

    • deleteDepartment

      public boolean deleteDepartment(String departmentName)
      Deletes the department with the given name from the database.
      Parameter:
      departmentName - The name of the department to delete.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the deletion was successful, false otherwise.

    • updateDepartment

      public boolean updateDepartment(String departmentName, String newKontoNumber)
      Updates the konto number of a department with the given name.
      Parameter:
      departmentName - The name of the department to update.
      newKontoNumber - The new konto number to set.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the update was successful, false otherwise.

    • getDepartment

      public Map<String,Object> getDepartment(String departmentName)
      Retrieves the department with the given name from the database.
      Parameter:
      departmentName - The name of the department to retrieve.
      Gibt zurück:
      a map containing the department's name and konto number, or null if not found.

    • getAllDepartments

      public List<Map<String,Object>> getAllDepartments()
      Retrieves all departments from the database.
      Gibt zurück:
      a list map containing all departments with their names and konto numbers.

    • clearCache

      public void clearCache()
      Clear both per-department and list caches immediately.
